name: kinetic-type-swap
title: Kinetic Type Swap
description: A held sentence keeps its fixed text in place while one widest-word masked slot rolls through alternatives and settles on the final option.
evidence: Wave I I2 true-spec contract: one widest-option masked word slot rolls while the surrounding sentence remains fixed

variables.label: Prefix
variables.description: Fixed sentence text before the rolling word slot.

variables.label: Options
variables.description: Comma-separated words shown in the rolling slot.

variables.label: Suffix
variables.description: Fixed sentence text after the rolling word slot.

variables.label: Cues
variables.description: Comma-separated seconds (from mount start) for each word swap. Empty keeps the authored even spread.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color used by the rolling word slot.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the sentence holds until the frame cuts.
